title: Baseline Performance Rule
content: Baseline performance means comparing the athlete's average output in the recent time window to the athlete's historical average before that window. For generic performance questions, this MVP uses total_distance as the primary proxy and also returns sprint distance, high intensity efforts, and duration context.

title: Underperforming Interpretation
content: The term underperforming routes to the historical-versus-recent baseline comparison. If the user does not name a metric explicitly, the system falls back to the workload proxy based on total distance.

title: Position Grouping Guidance
content: Grouped analytics can use athlete position, team, session_type, or session_date. Position and team come from athletes, while session_type and session_date come from sessions.
